originatingBug: verifyBlock returns 'sat' when Z3 outputs 'sat', 'unsat' when Z3 outputs 'unsat', and 'unknown' when Z3 outputs 'unknown'

declarations: (declare-const z3_output String) (declare-const return_value String) (assert (and (= z3_output "sat") (not (= return_value "sat"))))
smt.assertion: (declare-const z3_output String) (declare-const return_value String) (assert (and (= z3_output "sat") (not (= return_value "sat"))))
